description: Diamond structure: temperatureC -> moisture, temperatureC -> density, moisture -> resonanceFreq, density -> resonanceFreq (Common cause with mediated paths)

temperatureC.comment: Root controllable property - not directly observable

moisture.comment: Hybrid: controllable base moisture (20-60) + effect from temperature. Manual adjustment changes base value.

density.comment: Hybrid: controllable base density (30-70) + effect from temperature. Manual adjustment changes base value.

notes.hybrid_nodes: moisture and density are hybrid nodes - they have controllable base values modified by temperature
notes.computation_base_variable: In hybrid node computations, 'base' refers to the node's own base_value
notes.example_moisture: moisture = base(20-60) + 0.5 * temperatureC. Adjusting moisture changes its base value.
notes.example_density: density = base(30-70) + 0.4 * temperatureC. Adjusting density changes its base value.
